description_long: This object appears to be a highly abstracted and distorted representation of an adult pedestrian, with elongated and warped limbs and body features. The form is stretched and twisted, with the lower limbs splayed out and the upper body and arms extended in unnatural directions. The surface is smooth with a mix of dark and light tones, suggesting clothing and exposed skin, but the details are heavily stylized and lack realistic anatomical definition. The head is barely distinguishable, blending into the upper torso, and the overall silhouette is irregular and asymmetrical. The object gives the impression of a human figure in motion, but the proportions and posture are exaggerated and surreal. There are no visible accessories or carried objects, and the clothing appears to be a single, continuous garment.
description: A highly abstract, distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs and a warped, asymmetrical body. The surface is smooth and stylized, with minimal anatomical detail.
description_view_0: From this view, the broad, triangular lower body and splayed legs are prominent, with the upper body and head blending together.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the extreme elongation of one arm and the twisting of the torso, with the legs appearing uneven.
description_view_2: The back and one extended arm are visible, showing the stretched, ribbon-like quality of the limbs and the lack of clear facial features.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the asymmetry of the figure, with the limbs and body appearing even more distorted and abstract.
attribute_clothing_type: form-fitting bodysuit with no visible seams or accessories
attribute_posture: distorted, elongated stance with limbs splayed and body twisted
attribute_hairstyle: indistinct, head shape blended with upper body
